text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear excited cheers coming from the distance.
When I get closer, I spot the performers of the
celebration concert rehearsing on an outdoor
stage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're up next, McQueen! Match Spe's pose and
start the choreography from there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! This is far too sudden!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You won't get anywhere thinking like that! It has
to be sudden or you'll never learn to improvise!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This is a little late, but, um... do we really need
improvisation training?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You gotta mentally prepare too! I
mean, you'll probably end up doing something
impromptu during the breaks or even mid-song.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm... That is logical.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You heard her, McQueen! And you better keep
your cool on the big night!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?! You're the last person to be educating me on composure!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have to think on your feet to improvise well.
It's about immediately reacting to whatever
someone said or did last.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
So when Special Week says "Go get 'em!" and
does her dance, I could say... "or go home."

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. It's practice to hone our reflexes, so the
key is to keep going, even if things go off the
rails! Okay, let's try this again!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right, Hayahide! Your turn!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
D-don't get confused! This was just meant to be
an "Ouch, my neck!" pose. My head isn't actually
heavy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Smile, Taishin! Smile!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tch... I'm nowhere near done yet.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Behold! The Golshi legendary technique is
a-coming!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm lettin' loose and... takin' a break!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...That was more... ordinary than I was anticipating.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Y'all look like I goofed! But what I really did
was throw you off to subvert your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Darn it all... Suzuka, it's up to you now! Pick up
what I'm puttin' down!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Um... uh...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Str...strawberry cake!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well... when I hear "take a break," I think of cake.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You've gotta link the dance move, not come up with some lame line! This isn't comedy improv! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! You did it, Suzuka! Your awkwardness
was super adorable! Full marks!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Heh... Hehehe! Thank you, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today's practice was such a great time! I laughed
so hard!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, me too. Everyone's ideas came together to
form a dance no one could've expected.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! The concert is going to be absolutely
amazing! I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! With our crew, it'll definitely be a
performance full of surprises, that's for sure!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Could that be... why I'm so excited?
